title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 198.403 - Formula set forth in rules
text:
198.403.  Formula set forth in rules. — Each nursing facility's reimbursement allowance shall be based on a formula set forth in rules and regulations promulgated by the department of social services as provided in section 198.436.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1362 § 2) 
Expires 9-30-29; see § 198.439
